arts.ttl: Why Raheem Sterling is not in the Arsenal squad vs Chelsea
arts.sum: Arsenal are meanwhile sweating over the fitness of Declan Rice, who failed to train before Friday having picked up a knock against Newcastle United last week. Sterling’s omission against Chelsea means he will have gone a full month without Premier League minutes by the time the international break is over.

arts.ttl: Sunday's Transfer Talk Update: Nicolas Jackson, Victor Osimhen, Danilo
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Chelsea star Cole Palmer delivers cryptic injury update ahead of Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Chelsea talisman Cole Palmer remains a major fitness worry ahead of Sunday's huge London derby against Arsenal, but fans have been buoyed by one of his new social media posts

arts.ttl: 'Amazing' Chelsea player can prove he was a much better signing than Arsenal star today - opinion
arts.sum: A battle to keep an eye on this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Sunday's Premier League predictions including Chelsea vs. Arsenal
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Premier League fixtures, including Chelsea vs. Arsenal.

arts.ttl: I should never have left Chelsea for Arsenal - I wanted out after three months
arts.sum: After just one season at Arsenal, Willian left the Gunners to return to Brazil and sign for Corinthians where he would spend one year before returning to the Premier League to sign for Fulham in 2022. It was during Willian's time in Brazil that he first reflected on his time at Arsenal, where he admitted that he wanted to leave the Gunners after just three months at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Roberto de Zerbi has just proven Todd Boehly right over Enzo Maresca Chelsea manager decision
arts.sum: The likes of Kieran McKenna and Roberto de Zerbi were linked with the Chelsea job before Maresca was chosen to be the main man. There were plenty of names in the frame to take over as the new Chelsea manager when Mauricio Pochettino left Stamford Bridge in the summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Two ex-players eyed as Edu replacements as Odegaard earns lofty comparison
arts.sum: Arsenal are travelling across London to face Chelsea in the Premier League on Sunday, days after being rocked by the surprise departure of Edu as sporting director

arts.ttl: 14-year-old Arsenal wonderkid trains with first team ahead of Chelsea clash
arts.sum: The 17-year-old has broken into the first team picture at Arsenal this season, making eight appearances in all competitions. Arsenal are stepping up their preparations for Sunday’s Premier League clash against Chelsea as Mikel Arteta puts his squad through their paces in the final training session before the match.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. Chelsea: Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal needs to win against Chelsea before the international break to build confidence and try and shorten the gap with Man City and Liverpool.
